subject: Dec 30th, 2025
fact: The session takes place on December 30th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 30th, 2025

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is the master of the palace and the party's current contact.
source_quote: Maram il Vass's opulent office

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur is an artificer who created two sets of magical armor.
source_quote: Felkur had used his magical abilities to create two sets of armor

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim possesses enhanced sight that reveals the true form of the Yugoloth.
source_quote: revealed as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws to Bramgrim's enhanced sight

subject: Daein
fact: Daein weaves a convincing story about the armor's origin to deceive Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Daein seized the opportunity and wove the suggestion into their story

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marks a Chasme Demon with her hunter's focus.
source_quote: Akritas marked one of the demons with her hunter's focus

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the drow prisoner the party was sent to retrieve.
source_quote: the freed drow, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is a traumatized commoner who escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: traumatized commoners Teegan and Drystan who had escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is a traumatized commoner who escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: traumatized commoners Teegan and Drystan who had escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deep gnome guard serving Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Gabberforth, the deep gnome guard

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord whose Chosen were rumored to be killed in Hillsfar.
source_quote: rumors of Graz'zt's Chosen being killed in Hillsfar

subject: Yugoloth
fact: The Yugoloth appears as a handsome half-elf to most observers.
source_quote: appearing as a handsome half-elf to most

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon taunts Bramgrim with the phrase 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside.'
source_quote: "So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man."

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon taunts Akritas with the phrase 'I have played with the minds of demons who define terror.'
source_quote: "I have played with  the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you."

subject: hags
fact: Three hags arrive to take over guard duty at the hanging gardens.
source_quote: glimpsed three hags arriving to take over guard duty

subject: hags
fact: The hags mutter that they cannot get good hired help these days.
source_quote: "You can't get good hired help these days."

subject: Blood War
fact: Chasme Demons are designed to punish deserters from the Blood War.
source_quote: creatures designed to punish deserters from the Blood War

subject: Maram il Vass's office
fact: The party returns to Maram il Vass's office with the freed prisoner.
source_quote: escaped back to Maram il Vass's office

subject: hanging gardens
fact: The hanging gardens are located downstairs and contain hanging cages.
source_quote: directed them to the hanging gardens below to retrieve their prisoner

subject: storage room
fact: The storage room contains empty containers.

subject: Underdark
fact: The party's journey previously went through the Underdark.

fact: Felkur created two sets of armor that appear genuine for eight hours.

fact: The party takes the key from the door after Maram il Vass unlocks it.

fact: Luminescent fungus clings to the ceiling of the cavern providing pale glow.

fact: Heavy chains run the length of the cavern suspending cages.

fact: Maram il Vass is a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth with demonic jaws and claws.

fact: Maram il Vass appears as a handsome, chic half-elf to those without magical sight.

fact: Maram il Vass holds the drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this.

fact: Maram il Vass has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur.

fact: Maram il Vass expresses admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills.

source_quote: magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison

fact: Chasme Demons communicate telepathically with polyphonic, buzzing, clicking voices.

subject: Maram il Vass's Office
fact: Maram il Vass's office is an opulent chamber filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures.
source_quote: An opulent chamber within Maram il Vass's palace, filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: The Empty Storage Room is adjacent to Maram il Vass's office.
source_quote: A room adjacent to Maram il Vass's office

fact: The Empty Storage Room contains shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels.
source_quote: containing shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: The Empty Storage Room has a staircase leading downwards to the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: and a staircase leading downwards to the Hanging Gardens

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: The Hanging Gardens are a vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall.
source_quote: A vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: The Hanging Gardens are lit by luminescent fungus that creates an eerie pale illumination.
source_quote: lit by luminescent fungus that creates an eerie pale illumination

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Heavy chains run the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages.
source_quote: Heavy chains run the length of the cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Most cages in the Hanging Gardens are occupied by a single prisoner.
source_quote: most occupied by a single prisoner

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the area

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is a location mentioned by Maram il Vass as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed.
source_quote: A location mentioned by Maram il Vass as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed

subject: Armor Sets
fact: Two sets of armor were magically created by Felkur using his abilities.
source_quote: Two sets of armor magically created by Felkur using his abilities

fact: The armor sets were presented as payment for the drow prisoner.

source_quote: One chain was broken by Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon to free Xaven Tanor'this's cage

subject: Magical Item
fact: Maram il Vass desires an item of 'no material consequence' that he tasks Felkur with retrieving.
source_quote: An item of 'no material consequence' that Maram il Vass desires and tasks Felkur with retrieving

subject: Contract
fact: The contract is a magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures.
source_quote: A magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures

fact: The contract was meticulously crafted by Maram il Vass.

fact: Felkur refined the contract to include a clause about the magical item's location and defenses.
source_quote: further refined by Felkur during negotiations to include a clause about the magical item's location and defenses

subject: Contract
fact: The contract includes a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement.
source_quote: a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement

fact: The contract grants Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms.
source_quote: The contract grants Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: Maram il Vass proposes a deal to Felkur: retrieve a specific magical item for him, which he owes to another demon, in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location.

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract

fact: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law.

subject: Felkur's Deal
fact: The contract is finalized.
